posts.author: LogicCircuits
posts.title: Japan begins bounty system awarding ¥50,000 for each illegal immigrant apprehended. Can we do the same in the US?

twitter.content:
Japan will begin to roll out a new bounty-style system for reporting illegal immigrants from the new fiscal year.

The program, which is set to begin in Ibaraki Prefecture, will reward 50,000 yen for each illegal immigrant successfully apprehended by authorities.
